Off Calendar Nov-04-2025 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Oct-01-2025 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Aug-26-2025 Continued To Oct-01-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-24-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Christopher Cole appeared by zoom for Justina Yee (petitioner).

Mr. Cole stated that the publication provided notice of today's hearing and time, that the reverse side refers to the second amended petition and that he feels sufficient notice was given. The court stated that it accepts the proof of mailing and publication that's on file. The court granted the Second Amended Petition for Letters of Administration. Justina Yee is appointed as the Administrator of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $550,000.00. Order for the same signed in open Court. A status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is set for August 26, 2025, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If either petition is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will go off calendar. Frank Mahoney III is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-10-2024 Continued To Jul-24-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jun-26-2024 Continued To Jul-10-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
